title: Ever make any Eva prop replicas or stuff from that universe
display_title: Ever make any Eva prop replicas or stuff from that universe
wikitext:
[]: Ever make any Eva prop replicas, or stuff from that universe             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Tue Jan 01, 2008 11:35 am OK, for my first post, I shall most likely post in the wrong area. <bows> Taa daaa! Anyhow, I was curious what lengths people have gone to to create something or have something from the Eva universe. Some ideas I've had: 1. To recreate the sign Misato stands in front of within HQ that indicates with arrows where everything is (mercifully in English) 2. Shinji's Nerv Folder he gets from Misato – toughest part is high res cap of the map of HQ. 3. (Rather extreme) I've always wanted to be able to create/buy a laptop case that would resemble the computers in Eva. Anyone do anything similar? And no "I bought the MythWear bag". That's cheating. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jan 01, 2008 12:11 pm Welcome! macrossmaster wrote: o recreate the sign Misato stands in front of within HQ that indicates with arrows where everything is (mercifully in English)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 05, 2008 1:50 am Ask Reichu, I'm sure she has a bunch of stuff. I've always wanted to make my own Sachi mask though, that would be neat to have.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Jan 05, 2008 2:55 am I have done some scrap 2D images of ALL the Angels, and although I would post them to the Pictures Thread, my scanner had a breakdown. I've also bought a whole bunch of unpainted Evangelions and tried painting them on my own. Which turned out to be slightly different than what I had expected.

[]:             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Sat Jan 05, 2008 4:39 pm Glad to see some responses! Thought I had the plague for a week or so there. Surprised Reichu hasn't said anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 05, 2008 4:47 pm macrossmaster wrote: Surprised Reichu hasn't said anything.

[]:             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:12 pm Shiver. So...cold...so (whispers) scared .

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Jan 05, 2008 7:02 pm Yeah, Reichu's drawings are pretty good, especially with Dragons and Avians. Her Evas look so...[what word]...realistic. I was about to copy one of them for my Avatar, but I was afraid that Reichu might remove it for copyright reasons. I also drew a picture of Arael, but from close range, it looks like a pile of twigs, but from long range, it looks so much like the real thing.
